title: Device Settings - Headset connected on Settings screen
scenario: Device Settings page dynamically updates to show full options when a paired but turned-off headset is turned on
steps: 1. Open the Device Settings screen on the device.
2. Ensure a headset is paired but turned off.
3. Observe the available options displayed on the screen.
5. Observe the available options displayed on the screen after the headset is connected.
expected: When the headset is turned off (paired but disconnected), only options for a disconnected device are shown. After turning the headset on, the settings page dynamically updates to display all available options for the connected device (except Remove Device).
